---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for OpenCart
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### **Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

### **Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### **Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### **Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

## 📋 Feature Details

### **Feature Category**
- [ ] Frontend (Customer-facing)
- [ ] Backend (Admin panel)
- [ ] API/Integration
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Developer Experience
- [ ] Other: ___________

### **Priority Level**
- [ ] Critical (Blocking current functionality)
- [ ] High (Important for next release)
- [ ] Medium (Nice to have)
- [ ] Low (Future consideration)

### **Implementation Complexity**
- [ ] Simple (Few hours of work)
- [ ] Medium (1-2 days of work)
- [ ] Complex (1+ weeks of work)
- [ ] Unknown

---

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria

Please define what "done" looks like for this feature:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

---

## 🔗 Related Issues/PRs

Link any related issues or pull requests:
- Related to #
- Depends on #
- Blocks #

---

## 📱 Platform/Browser Support

### **Required Support:**
- [ ] Desktop (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- [ ] Mobile (iOS Safari, Android Chrome)
- [ ] Tablet
- [ ] All platforms

### **OpenCart Version:**
- [ ] 4.0.x
- [ ] 4.1.x (current)
- [ ] Future versions

---

## 🧪 Testing Requirements

### **Testing Scope:**
- [ ] Unit tests required
- [ ] Integration tests required
- [ ] E2E tests required
- [ ] Manual testing sufficient

### **Test Scenarios:**
1. Scenario 1: ...
2. Scenario 2: ...
3. Scenario 3: ...

## 📚 Documentation Requirements

- [ ] API documentation updates needed
- [ ] User guide updates needed
- [ ] Developer documentation needed
- [ ] Admin guide updates needed
- [ ] No documentation changes required

---

## 🔒 Security Considerations

- [ ] This feature handles sensitive data
- [ ] This feature requires authentication
- [ ] This feature needs input validation
- [ ] This feature affects user permissions
- [ ] No security implications

---

## ⚡ Performance Considerations

- [ ] This feature may impact database performance
- [ ] This feature may affect page load times
- [ ] This feature requires caching strategy
- [ ] This feature needs optimization
- [ ] No performance impact expected

---

## 🌐 Internationalization

- [ ] This feature requires translation support
- [ ] This feature affects RTL languages
- [ ] This feature uses date/time formatting
- [ ] This feature handles currency/numbers
- [ ] No i18n requirements
